ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Pending Appraisal"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "In Appraisal"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Recommended for Approval"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Approved") ), Supporting_Docs_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Supporting documents must be complete before appraisal or approval.
